items.name_en: Top-tier original set with full packaging
items.name_cn:
Top-tier original set with full packaging
❤️❤️Lady D-Joy Medium, Embroidered Tassel Black, with sheepskin lining. The tassel is meticulously crafted, and the entire body is adorned with hand-embroidered matching mini beads, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. Adorned with a light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. The medium size features a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, making it ideal for daily wear. Dimensions: 26 x 13.5 x 5 cm

Factory leather with sheepskin lining Lady latest flip-flop sheepskin five-compartment, classic upgrade 📤, changed the zipper design that scratched hands before, it's really thoughtful 😘, after being hurt by various zipper bags, I really love the new five-compartment flip-flop design, full capacity 💯, looks good handheld or crossbody, retro quilted pattern and timeless bag shape, a classic bag every girl deserves 👜

DIOR Lady Sheepskin Bing, dynamic and dazzling, the bold sci-fi visual impact is stunning 🤤. The entire bag has a pearlescent laser effect, like a rainbow, very stunning! Paired with silver metal for more tension, so eye-catching 👍. The contrast between elegance and cool is unique to it. You must take it out for walks once you get it 😌. It is truly too beautiful!! ✔️
Size;20×16.5×8cm

Lady Dior Three-compartment Elephant Grey Lambskin Handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Combining an exquisite and dignified temperament with a stylish and modern style, it is a timeless classic piece. Adorned with the iconic light gold-finished metal "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette, paired with an adjustable leather shoulder strap ➕ a detachable metal chain shoulder strap. Dimensions: 17x15x7cm

Latest Dior summer denim series pink small size has shipped!!️
Dior D-Joybag denim has become a new star this year! The popularity is no less than any classic model, 😊 with the diamond element added to the previous design, the denim series was released, especially the matching color tree logo charm, which directly pushed the hype to the peak, starting a denim craze, a rare masterpiece only this one👍
Size;22.5*12*5.5cm
